allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Nettoyage OK'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.users.forEach\(u=>console.log\(u.email, '|', u.role, '| mdp:', u.hasPassword ? 'OK\('+u.passwordLength+'\)' : 'VIDE'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); dotenv.config\(\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async \(\) => { const Vente = require\('./src/models/Vente'\); const Cabotage = require\('./src/models/Cabotage'\); const vCount = await Vente.countDocuments\(\); const cCount = await Cabotage.countDocuments\(\); const v = await Vente.findOne\(\).lean\(\); const c = await Cabotage.findOne\(\).lean\(\); console.log\('Ventes:', vCount, '| dateVente sample:', v?.dateVente\); console.log\('Cabotages:', cCount, '| dateChargement sample:', c?.dateChargement\); mongoose.disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); dotenv.config\(\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async \(\) => { const Cabotage = require\('./src/models/Cabotage'\); const docs = await Cabotage.find\(\).limit\(3\).lean\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(docs.map\(d => Object.keys\(d\)\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('First doc:', JSON.stringify\(docs[0], null, 2\)\); mongoose.disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); dotenv.config\(\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async \(\) => { const Vente = require\('./src/models/Vente'\); const docs = await Vente.find\(\).limit\(2\).lean\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(docs, null, 2\)\); mongoose.disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); const dotenv = require\('dotenv'\); dotenv.config\(\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async \(\) => { const Vente = require\('./src/models/Vente'\); const Cabotage = require\('./src/models/Cabotage'\); const ventes = await Vente.find\(\).lean\(\); const cabotages = await Cabotage.find\(\).lean\(\); console.log\('=== VENTES ==='\); ventes.forEach\(v => console.log\(v.numeroVente, '|', v.dateVente, '|', new Date\(v.dateVente\).getFullYear\(\)\)\); console.log\('=== CABOTAGES ==='\); cabotages.forEach\(c => console.log\(c.numeroCabotage, '|', c.dateOperation, '|', new Date\(c.dateOperation\).getFullYear\(\)\)\); mongoose.disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")
